source: Cornell Movie-Dialogs Corpus (2011) + MovieSum (Saxena & Keller, 2024); actors via TMDB
rule: A word counts toward its first letter case-insensitively; names and hyphenated words (Xavier, x-ray) count, but a bare single letter or a digit-code does not count for the rare letters. Based on screenplay dialogue, not a forensic transcript.
